\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \gamma_{\text{Berry}} = i\oint_{\mathcal{C}} \langle n(\mathbf{R})| \nabla_{\mathbf{R}} |n(\mathbf{R})\...,theoretical_physics,n{Berry Phase Accumulation} For adiabatic evolution along path $\mathcal{C}$ in parameter space: \begin{equation} \gamma_{\text{Berry}} = i\oint_{\mathcal{C}} \langle n(\mathbf{R})| \nabla_{\mathbf{R}} |n(\mathbf{R})\rangle \cdot d\mathbf{R} = \int_{\mathcal{S}} \mathbf{F}_{\text{Berry}} \cdot d\mathbf{S} \end{equation}
